mapper.select:
SELECT l.title AS title, c.name AS courseName, cls.name AS className, room.name AS classroomName, t.name AS teacherName, l.dec_count AS deductionBase, l.bookable AS isBookable,
c.lesson_type AS rawCourseType, l.state AS rawState, l.date AS rawDate, l.start_time AS rawStartTime, l.end_time AS rawEndTime,
( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(s.name) FROM lesson_teacher lt LEFT JOIN staff s ON lt.teacher_id = s.id WHERE lt.lesson_id = l.id AND lt.type_num = 2 ) AS assistantName,
( SELECT COUNT(id) FROM lesson_student WHERE lesson_id = l.id ) AS expectedAttendance,
( SELECT COUNT(id) FROM lesson_student WHERE lesson_id = l.id AND sign_state = 1 ) AS actualAttendance
FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN lesson l ON a.lesson_id = l.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN `class` cls ON l.class_id = cls.id LEFT JOIN classroom room ON l.room_id = room.id LEFT JOIN staff t ON l.teacher_id = t.id
WHERE a.id = #{id}
